narration: Ever wonder how a tiny fish can hold toxins more than a shark?
visual_description: Hook visual: Ever wonder how a tiny fish can hold toxins more than a shark?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Ever wonder how a tiny fish can hold toxins more than a shark?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Ever wonder how a tiny fish can hold toxins more than a shark?

narration: This is biomagnification—when toxins increase in concentration as they move up the food chain.
visual_description: Context visual: This is biomagnification—when toxins increase in concentration as they move up the food chain.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: This is biomagnification—when toxins increase in concentration as they move up the food chain.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: This is biomagnification—when toxins increase in concentration as they move up the food chain.

narration: Small organisms absorb pollutants. Then, larger predators eat them, amplifying the toxin levels.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Small organisms absorb pollutants. Then, larger predators eat them, amplifying the toxin levels.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Small organisms absorb pollutants. Then, larger predators eat them, amplifying the toxin levels.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Small organisms absorb pollutants. Then, larger predators eat them, amplifying the toxin levels.

narration: Studies show that top predators can have toxin levels a thousand times higher than their prey.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Studies show that top predators can have toxin levels a thousand times higher than their prey.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Studies show that top predators can have toxin levels a thousand times higher than their prey.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Studies show that top predators can have toxin levels a thousand times higher than their prey.

narration: This affects not just wildlife, but also human health through our seafood.
visual_description: Payoff visual: This affects not just wildlife, but also human health through our seafood.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: This affects not just wildlife, but also human health through our seafood.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: This affects not just wildlife, but also human health through our seafood.

narration: Stay informed about what’s on your plate. Knowledge is power!
